title: sphaerolobium daviesioides
intro: Sphaerolobium daviesioides, also known as the 'Golden Pea', is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is a legume native to Western Australia, known for its yellow flowers and small, pea-like pods. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as skin conditions and respiratory problems. Sphaerolobium daviesioides can be prepared as an herbal remedy in the form of a tincture or infusion, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its medicinal properties.
